title: Life Processes - Nutrition and Respiration
subject: Science
learningOutcomes: Simulate circulatory 4-chamber heart blood flow (oxygenated vs deoxygenated).
Calculate Lindeman's 10% Trophic Energy Transfer Pyramid.

objectives.text: Increase Sunlight Intensity above 50% and observe oxygen bubble production.
Switch to Human Anatomy view to observe cardiac output $CO = HR \times SV$.

theory: Life processes maintain essential biological homeostasis. Autotrophs capture sunlight to synthesize carbohydrates via photosynthesis.
hints: Adjust the Sunlight Intensity slider to see gas bubble formation.
Use the Biology Toolbar tabs to switch between Photosynthesis, Anatomy, and Ecosystem.
observationPrompts: Why is oxygen gas released as a byproduct during the light reaction of photosynthesis?

realWorldExamples.title: Global Oxygen Production
realWorldExamples.description: Ocean phytoplankton and rainforests generate over 70% of Earth's atmospheric oxygen.

commonMistakes: Thinking plants only perform photosynthesis; plants also perform cellular respiration 24/7.
